name: NaviCraft
description: AI-powered playlist generation via NaviCraft. Create a playlist named 'your prompt [navicraft]' and it will be populated with AI-curated songs.
author: NaviCraft

http.reason: Communicate with the NaviCraft backend API for AI playlist generation

cache.reason: Track in-flight generation requests to avoid duplicates

subsonicapi.reason: Read playlists to detect [navicraft] tags and update them with generated songs

navicraftUrl.title: NaviCraft URL
navicraftUrl.description: URL of the NaviCraft backend (e.g. http://navicraft:8765)

pollIntervalSeconds.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.description: How often to check for new [navicraft] playlists

defaultSongs.title: Default Song Count
defaultSongs.description: Default number of songs when not specified in the playlist name
